column1: Dataset Title: Arctic Vegetation Archive: Marshes of Malozemelskaya tundra Vegetation Plots
Dataset Author: Olga Lavrinenko, Nadezhda Matveyeva

Dataset Reference: Matveyeva, N. V., and O. V. Lavrinenko. (2011). Marsh vegetation in the north-east of Malozemelskaya tundra. Rastitelnost Rossii, 17–18. https://doi.org/10.31111/vegrus/2011.17-18.45
Dataset Table: Species Cover Data for Marshes of Malozemelskaya tundra Vegetation Plots

Dataset Notes: Species cover classes are the new Braun-Blanquet cover-abundance scale: r (single), + (less than 1 percent), 1 (1 to 5 percent), 2a (6 to 12 percent), 2b (13 to 25 percent), 3 (26 to 50 percent), 4 (51 to 75 percent), and 5 (76 to 100 percent). Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
